economic_notes: Nation has investments in Katzie Development Corporation Ltd., Katzie Master GP Ltd., and Katzie Master Limited Partnership (99.99%). Katzie Master Limited Partnership had total revenue of $5,786,244 and net income of $4,622,110 for year ended December 31, 2023. Portfolio investments of $17.7M held at RBC Dominion Securities.
notes: Six entities fully consolidated including Katzie Cultural Education Society, Katzie Early Years Society, Katzie First Nation Affordable Housing Development Society, Katzie First Nation Bus Corporation Ltd., Katzie First Nation Housing Society, and Smuq'wa Development Corp. Three GBEs accounted for using modified equity method: Katzie Development Corporation Ltd., Katzie Master GP Ltd., and Katzie Master Limited Partnership. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($7,601,991) + Province of BC ($2,233,050) + FNHA ($1,060,885) + Government of Canada ($153,661) + CMHC ($73,754) + Fisheries and Oceans Canada ($1,219,560) + BC Treaty Commission ($600,000) + New Relationship Trust ($261,000) + FNESC ($108,707) + Sto:lo Aboriginal Skills & Employment Training ($70,634) + Surrey Schools ($11,765) + Fraser Health Authority ($5,000) = $13,399,007; however OSR includes earnings from GBEs, investment income, rental income, referral fees, WWF, and other funding. Annual debt service reflects only long-term debt repayments per cash flow statement ($136,036); BC Housing Loan of $5,433,327 has no set repayment schedule. Accumulated surplus includes $2,519,873 in remeasurement gains held separately.
